name: Beef Stew#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef with the onions in a large pot until the meat is browned.
2. Add 3 cups of water and bay leaves to the pot. Heat over medium heat.
3. Peel the potatoes and carrots as the stew simmers.
4. Add the diced potatoes and sliced carrots to the pot.
5. Cover with additional water and bring to a boil.
6. Cook until the potatoes are tender.
7. Mix together a flour and water mixture in a small bowl to thicken the stew.
8. Stir the thickening mixture into the pot, ensuring no lumps form.
9. Add salt, pepper, and any other desired spices, such as garlic or oregano.
10. Simmer until the stew reaches the desired thickness.
11. Serve hot with dumplings made from a box of Bisquick if desired.
